prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜 2026 年排名第 80 名，近年排名稳定（2021 年第 82 名→2026 年第 80 名），属中上水平 211；2026 年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报；2025 年周期亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音综合热度排名第 77 位，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等偏低，整体报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；合肥工业大学第五轮学科评估中管理科学与工程获评 A 级，为唯一 A- 及以上学科；宣城校区招生专业以工科为主，计算机科学与技术、电气工程与智能控制、软件工程等专业与本校优势学科关联紧密，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高（2024 年均为高热推荐/推荐），对物理类考生吸引力强；土木建筑、生化环材等专业热度偏低或明显劝退。江西省 2026 年物理类考生约 26.8 万人，较 2025 年约 26.6 万人小幅增加，竞争略有加剧；2026 年；合肥工业大学（宣城校区）位于安徽省，与江西省相邻，地域接受度高；该校在江西省招生计划占比较高，属省外招生重点省 份，对江西考生有稳定的吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次异常后移、2026 年小幅缩招、本省考生数略增及声誉偏负面等因素，预计 2026 年物理类录取位次较 2025 年有所回升（竞争略加剧），但受缩招及声誉影响回升幅度有限；预测最低位次约 32764 名，区间 32264–33264 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 14784 → 17826 → → 13408 → 33664. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 20256 places, mainly due to the splitting of major groups and the lowering of admission thresholds for the unrestricted re-selection group. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 33664. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jiangxi Province was 89 students in 2021, 92 in 2022, 95 in 2024, and 101 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 98 students, a reduction of 3 from 2025, indicating a slight contraction and slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranks 80th, with stable rankings in recent years (82nd in 2021 → 80th in 2026), placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct. The 2025 cycle was also somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors). Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 77th, with an evaluation of 'average,' and short video exposure is moderately low. Overall, there is no clear sign of increased attention for application. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hefei University of Technology's Management Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the only A- or above discipline. The Xuancheng Campus offers majors mainly in engineering, with Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control, Software Engineering, etc., closely related to the university's advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (all were highly recommended/recommended in 2024), strongly attracting Physics Category candidates. Majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials have low popularity or are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 268,000, a slight increase from about 266,000 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, with high regional acceptance. The university's enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province accounts for a relatively high proportion, making it a key province for out-of-province enrollment, providing stable attraction for Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the abnormal ranking drop in 2025, slight enrollment contraction in 2026, a slight increase in the number of local candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking for the Physics Category will rebound somewhat compared to 2025 (slightly intensified competition), but the rebound will be limited due to the contraction and reputation impact. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 32764, with a range of 32264–33264.

- Software Engineering (Xuancheng Campus).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 32264–33264, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 32000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 33000), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors and consider Tier 3 majors as stable choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3862→3612→→3993→4409, showing a general backward trend in the past 3 years, with a baseline of about 4409 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangxi Province History Category was 9 students in 2021–2022, 11 in 2024, 10 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 13 students, an increase of 3 students (30% growth) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 80th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct; its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, rated as 'average', with no clear signs of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A level, the only A- or above discipline; the History Category enrollment majors (English, Network and New Media) have low correlation with the university's advantageous engineering disciplines, with relatively limited disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Network and New Media major is divided and wait-and-see, while English/foreign language majors have average popularity and are also wait-and-see, with overall attractiveness being moderate. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 207,000, roughly the same as the 206,000 in 2025; in 2026; Hefei University of Technology (Xuancheng Campus) is located in Anhui Province, adjacent to Jiangxi Province, with high regional acceptance; the university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi Province History Category is small, with only 13 students even after expansion, having a limited impact on the overall competition landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of rankings in 2025, the significant 30% expansion in 2026, the basically unchanged number of local examinees, and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the 2026 History Category admission ranking will continue to move backward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with the expansion effect being the main driving factor; the predicted minimum ranking is about 5403, with a range of 4903–5903.
